data.description: JGBs Mixed; May Be Supported by Prospects of BOJ Policy Hold-WSJ

data.title: China-US: Old Friends, New Stories | NYU Shanghai Vice-Chancellor Jeffrey Lehman: I played against a Chinese table tennis player in 1972
data.description: This year commemorates the 55th anniversary of the historic China-US Ping-Pong Diplomacy, a crucial event that led to the normalization of relations between the two nations. In honor of this milestone, a series of interviews will delve into the journey of people-to-people exchanges between China and the US.

data.title: Agreement on Strategic Partnership Through Investment in U.S.-Based CargoSense, Expanding into the Data Center and Supply Chain Sectors Amid Growing Demand for AI Infrastructure
data.description: CargoSense, Inc., headquartered in Virginia, USA and led by CEO Richard Kilmer, unveiled today that it has secured a strategic investment for its groundbreaking "Agentic (Autonomous) Supply Chain Execution Platform". The company, known for being the first to develop this innovative platform, shared news of the investment on April 14, 2026.

data.title: HeartBeam Announces Pricing of $10 Million Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: HeartBeam, a company based in Santa Clara, California, has revealed the pricing details of their public offering of common stock. They have announced a $10 million offering in total.

data.title: TVU NETWORKS AND GRASS VALLEY PARTNER TO GIVE BROADCASTERS UNPRECEDENTED WORKFLOW FLEXIBILITY WITH AMPP AND TVU MEDIAMESH®
data.description: TVU Networks announced on April 14, 2026, in Cupertino, California, that the seamless interoperability between AMPP and MediaMesh allows production teams to create top-notch workflows, launch quicker, and expand live production worldwide. This is done without being tied to a specific platform or compromising infrastructure. This development enhances flexibility and efficiency in the industry.

data.title: MindBio Appoints Market Maker Venture Liquidity Providers
data.description: MindBio has enlisted the services of Venture Liquidity Providers Inc to introduce its market making service. This move aims to facilitate the maintenance of a smooth and organized trading market for the company.

data.title: Allogene Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALLO) based in South San Francisco announced the pricing of an underwritten public offering of 87,500,000 common stock shares at $2.00 per share. The gross proceeds are expected to reach $175 million, with the offering set to close by April 16, 2026. Additionally, the underwriters have a 30-day option to buy up to 13,125,000 more shares at the same price per share. The final proceeds will be lower after accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses.

data.title: New White Paper Calls for Precision Approach to Section 232 in Medical Device Sector
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Antonio Ortiz-Mena, the Chief Executive Officer of AOM Advisors, and Christopher G. Sheeron, the Chief Executive Officer of Action for Health, unveiled a white paper titled "Critical Care: Safeguarding U.S. Medical Device Superiority via Targeted Section 232 Action." This document delves into strategies to preserve America's position in medical device innovation.
